comment: Machine-readable SSOT for cross-vendor worker dispatch (docs/model-routing.md § Cross-vendor lanes). Roles map to backends at a tier; backends map to CLI argv. argv = cmd + tier_args[role.tier] + role.args_extra. Model names NEVER appear here — each vendor's adapter/profile owns its tier (codex --profile deep = TOP-tier reasoning per the enforcement map). A disabled backend (enabled: false) refuses loudly with its disabled_reason — never a silent fallback.

gemini.disabled_reason: individual OAuth sign-in retired upstream (2026-07); the paid credential path requires prepaid credits. Set enabled: true only after verifying a working login on this machine.

grok.disabled_reason: CLI is early beta (2026-07) — config slot only. Set enabled: true once the CLI is installed and authenticated.
